explanations.pt-br: SimpleWebPageReader com html_to_text=True para converter HTML em texto puro de URLs.
explanations.en-us: SimpleWebPageReader with html_to_text=True to convert HTML to plain text from URLs.

explanations.pt-br: Cada documento carrega metadados com URL original e texto extraído.
explanations.en-us: Each document carries metadata with original URL and extracted text.
